name: 4-Methoxyamphetamine
mechanismOfAction: 4-Methoxyamphetamine is a seratogenic drug of the amphetamine class. The drug acts as a potent and selective serotonin releasing agent. It binds to alpha receptors to mediate these effects.

interactions.name: Iobenguane
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Iobenguane can be decreased when used in combination with 4-Methoxyamphetamine.

interactions.name: Esmolol
interactions.description: 4-Methoxyamphetamine may increase the atrioventricular blocking (AV block) activities of Esmolol.
